title: Trump Administration Withholds $259 Million in Medicaid Funds From Minnesota
author: Chris Cameron
fullText: Vice President JD Vance said that the Trump administration had been forced to “turn the screws on” Minnesota so the state would respond to allegations of fraud.
summary: Vice President JD Vance said that the Trump administration had been forced to “turn the screws on” Minnesota so the state would respond to allegations of fraud.
